    Class
    Description
    static final record 
    CelExpr.Add
    Addition: x + y.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.And
    Logical AND comparison: x && y.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.Divide
    Division: x / y.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.EqualTo
    Equality comparison: x == y.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.GreaterThan
    Greater than relational comparison: x > y.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.GreaterThanOrEqualTo
    Greater than or equal to relational comparison: x >= y.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.In
    Containment comparison: x in y.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.LessThan
    Less than relational comparison: x < y.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.LessThanOrEqualTo
    Less than or equal to relational comparison: x <= y.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.Modulo
    Modulo/remainder: x % y.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.Multiply
    Multiplication: x * y.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.NotEqualTo
    Inequality comparison: x != y.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.Or
    Logical OR comparison: x || y.
    static final record 
    CelExpr.Subtract
    Subtraction: x - y.
